meta.note: status: NOT_RUN | PASS | FAIL | BLOCKED | SKIPPED
meta.evidencePolicy: Sensitive raw tokens, JWTs, SSNs/resident IDs, signed URLs, and push tokens are intentionally omitted.

runs.title: 자동 입력된 유효 추천코드 query를 검색 결과에서 선택해 회원가입하면 추천 관계가 confirmed 된다
runs.notes: Signup-time referral confirmation requires a disposable new FC signup; current run used existing user-provided accounts only.

runs.title: 무효 또는 비활성 추천코드는 확정되지 않는다
runs.notes: Invalid/inactive referral-code mutation matrix was not executed without a working total-admin/developer actor.

runs.title: 자기추천은 차단된다
runs.notes: Self-referral signup mutation was not executed against user-provided accounts.

runs.title: 이미 확정된 추천 관계는 다른 코드로 재확정되지 않는다
runs.notes: Reconfirmation mutation was not executed against existing user-provided accounts.

runs.title: 앱이 이미 설치된 상태에서 초대링크 진입 시 자동 추천이 확정된다
runs.notes: Invite-link mobile deep-link confirmation requires disposable signup/device reset; not executed against user-provided accounts.

runs.title: 앱 미설치 상태에서는 자동 복원이 없고 추천인 검색-선택 fallback이 필요하다
runs.notes: App-not-installed path requires install-state reset; not executed in current emulator pass.

runs.title: 자동 입력된 링크 추천보다 사용자가 가입 완료 전 다시 검색해 선택한 추천코드가 우선한다
runs.notes: Signup override path requires disposable signup; not executed against user-provided accounts.

runs.title: 앱 설치 상태 exact 8자리 초대링크는 broad search와 중복 pending apply 없이 한 번만 추천인 검색을 수행한다
runs.notes: Exact 8-character invite-link search de-dup was not executed in mobile UI.

runs.title: 추천코드 공유 진입점은 같은 HTTPS invite URL 문구를 사용하고 direct deep-link 공유 문구를 노출하지 않는다
evidence: FC referral graph/share entry route loaded for FC session; direct deep-link token values were not recorded.

runs.title: 한 추천인은 여러 가입자를 추천할 수 있다
runs.notes: Multiple-invitee mutation path was not executed without disposable invitees.

runs.title: 한 가입자는 최종 추천인 1명만 가진다
runs.notes: Single-final-inviter mutation path was not executed without disposable invitee state.

runs.title: Android 추천인 검색 입력 시 영문/한글/붙여넣기 입력이 중복되지 않고 IME 조합이 깨지지 않는다
runs.notes: Android IME composition matrix was not completed in this pass.

runs.title: 회원가입 화면에서 이름/소속/추천코드 검색으로 추천인을 선택해야만 최종 저장이 유효한 추천코드 기준으로 수렴한다

runs.title: eligible FC/본부장은 로그인 성공 시 active 추천코드가 자동 보장되고 기존 코드는 유지된다
evidence: FC and manager logins succeeded; FC/admin_web graph session was created for eligible FC; request_board role mapping remained intact.

runs.title: 변조되었거나 만료된 초대링크는 graceful fallback으로 처리된다
runs.notes: Tampered/expired invite-link matrix was not executed in mobile UI.

runs.title: 가입 도중 이탈 후 재진입해도 로컬 pending 추천코드가 유지된다

runs.title: cold start 또는 background resume에서도 중복 확정 없이 복원된다

runs.notes: Observed defect: manager GET /api/admin/referrals returned 500 with Undici headers-overflow from oversized referral query, while manager POST mutations returned 403.

runs.title: manager는 추천인 코드 화면과 GET은 조회 가능하지만 mutate UI와 POST 권한은 없다
evidence: Observed defect: manager GET /api/admin/referrals returned 500 with Undici headers-overflow from oversized referral query, while manager POST mutations returned 403. Manager POST mutation denial did pass with 403.
runs.notes: Observed defect: manager GET /api/admin/referrals returned 500 with Undici headers-overflow from oversized referral query, while manager POST mutations returned 403. Manager POST mutation denial did pass with 403.

runs.title: 레거시 추천인 검토 큐에서 구조화 링크가 없는 FC를 계정 선택형으로 연결하고 감사 로그를 남긴다

runs.title: `/dashboard/referrals/graph`는 linked edge 기준으로 빈 선 없이 그려지고 manager read-only를 유지한다
evidence: Manager and FC referral graph routes loaded; /api/admin/referrals/graph returned 200 for FC; manager UI retained read-only indicators.

runs.title: graph canvas는 node drag, 빈 공간 pan, reset, 기본 node name label, active drag branch stability를 지원한다
evidence: Graph unit/simulation suite passed 42/42 via npx -y tsx --test web/src/lib/referral-graph-interaction.test.ts web/src/lib/referral-graph-simulation.test.ts web/src/lib/referral-graph-display.test.ts web/src/lib/referral-graph-responsive.test.ts from repo root.

Authenticated admin_web FC graph browser QA passed without storing cookie values: /api/admin/referrals/graph returned 200, /dashboard/referrals/graph rendered a visible 1261x668 canvas, sampled canvas pixels were nonblank, ?? ??? was visible/clickable, a canvas drag was attempted, and console/page error counts stayed 0.
runs.notes: Session cookies were used only inside the browser context; cookie values, JWTs, tokens, and signed URLs were not printed or persisted.

runs.title: 레거시 추천인 검토 큐는 자동 연결 가능/동명이인 후보 다수/후보 없음/잘못된 자기추천 상태를 정확히 분류한다
runs.notes: Legacy review queue classification depends on /api/admin/referrals GET, which currently fails for manager and needs total-admin validation.

runs.title: `안전 자동 정리`는 exact-unique만 구조화하고 자기추천/후보 없음/동명이인은 남긴다
runs.notes: Blocked: provided developer/admin candidate account ***6018 returned ok=false/no cookies with supplied password, so total-admin/developer mutation flows were not executed.

runs.title: 현재 persisted runtime 범위 내에서 current-state 변경 이벤트 타임라인이 복원 가능하다
evidence: Observation/logging path needs redaction: sensitive runtime payload classes appeared in console/server logs during E2E.
runs.notes: Observation/logging path needs redaction: sensitive runtime payload classes appeared in console/server logs during E2E.

runs.title: current-state snapshot과 audit event가 부분 성공 없이 함께 기록되고 inviter snapshot이 유지된다
runs.notes: Current-state/audit atomicity requires referral mutation actor; total-admin/developer session unavailable.

runs.title: 동명이인 이름과 무관하게 invitee 추천코드 조회는 profile snapshot만 반환하고 inviter 이후 코드 rotate 영향을 받지 않는다
runs.notes: Snapshot/rotate immunity requires referral rotate mutation; total-admin/developer session unavailable.

runs.title: `20260423000001_unify_referral_link_state.sql` rollout은 projection 누락 없이 clean apply되고 current-state snapshot backfill을 완료한다
runs.notes: Migration rollout/backfill was not applied in this runtime pass.

runs.title: 추천인 계정 삭제 후에도 attribution/event snapshot으로 이력이 복원된다
runs.notes: Referral history after account deletion was skipped because destructive deletion requires disposable account setup.

runs.title: 반복 무효 입력 또는 링크 변조는 추천 관계를 만들지 않는다
runs.notes: Repeated invalid-input/link-tamper matrix was not executed in mobile UI.

runs.title: direct client access는 차단되고 trusted server path만 추천인 read/write를 수행한다
evidence: FC staff APIs returned 403; manager referral/FC mutation APIs returned 403; trusted graph endpoint required valid session cookies.

runs.title: `set-password`는 OTP로 검증된 기존 profile 없이 신규 FC를 만들지 않는다
runs.notes: set-password security case would mutate auth/profile state; skipped pending disposable account.

runs.title: 중복 `set-password` 호출은 `already_set`로 거절되고 기존 추천인/온보딩 상태를 지우지 않는다
runs.notes: Duplicate set-password case would mutate auth/profile state; skipped pending disposable account.

runs.title: FC 기본정보 화면은 추천인 cache를 읽기 전용으로만 노출하고 일반 사용자 저장으로 덮어쓰지 않는다
evidence: FC referral graph route loaded as read-only/downline view; staff list/referrals APIs returned 403 for FC.

runs.title: request_board는 추천 관계 원본이 없어도 기존 흐름을 깨지 않는다
evidence: request_board runtime: FC/designer logins succeeded; synthetic requests #1123/#1124/#1125 covered accept, reject, complete, attachment placeholder, FC accept/reject, and chat messages.

runs.title: active 본부장 profile은 김형수를 기본 추천인으로 가진다
runs.notes: Default manager recommender assertion was not mutated/seeded in current pass; requires total-admin/developer validation.

runs.title: FC/본부장 self-service 추천코드 조회는 appSession 만료 시 bridge token으로 자동 복구되고, bridge도 없으면 재로그인을 요구한다
evidence: FC app/API login returned app/bridge session presence and FC admin_web graph session restored access without recording token values.

runs.title: FC/본부장 self-service 추천인 변경은 appSession 자동 복구 뒤에도 current-state snapshot과 audit trail 계약을 유지한다
runs.notes: Self-service recommender change would mutate current-state/audit trail; skipped for user-provided accounts.

runs.title: FC/본부장 self-service `/referral`은 direct recommender/tree 계약을 유지하면서 세션 만료 상태를 명확히 표면화한다
evidence: Six referral Edge consumers passed Deno checks and 24 focused referral/session tests.
All six active production bundles remained JWT protected and used only the dedicated current/previous app-session verifier.
Bounded read-only production smoke returned 200 with ok=true for both get-my-referral-code and get-referral-tree; the tree root was present.
New-version aggregate Edge logs contained one 200 for each affected page request and no 401.
runs.notes: INC-012. No database, Storage, secret, mobile release, Vercel, notification Edge, or admin-action mutation.
